description: Machine-readable session intent for agents and the in-game priority engine. Distinguishes human play from automation/CI, identifies active sprints, and exposes who is driving the game session.

drivenBy.description: Who is driving the game session. Standard taxonomy.

sessionId.description: Unique session identifier. Formatted as YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS or a UUID.

sprint.description: Active sprint or cert name visible to other agents.

agentRole.description: Agent role letter (A/B/C/D) or name. Aligned with agent-coordination.md.

priorityEngineMode.description: Requested priority engine behavior for this session.

autoLoopEnabled.description: Whether the agent auto-loop is enabled.

certProfile.description: Cert profile active for this session.

certSegment.description: Cert segment active for this session.

branch.description: Git branch being tested or proven.

commitSha.description: Git commit SHA at session start.
